command: C:\Users\0x007\forge\grimoires\loa\context\user-description.md
input:
{"file_path":"C:\Users\0x007\forge\grimoires\loa\context\user-description.md","content":"# Project Description (from /plan)
> Auto-generated from user's initial project description.

FORGE — Feed-Adaptive Oracle & Runtime Generator for Echelon.

FORGE is the Uniswap factory for prediction surfaces. Point it at any live data feed → it characterizes the data statistically → selects Theatre templates → deploys prediction markets. The classifier must work purely from statistical properties of the data stream (no source identity, no URL sniffing, no hardcoded field names).

Three convergence targets (backing specs):
- **TREMOR**: USGS seismic data → 5 Theatre templates (threshold_gate, cascade, divergence, anomaly, regime_shift)
- **CORONA**: NOAA SWPC + NASA DONKI space weather → 5 Theatre templates (3× threshold_gate, cascade, divergence)
- **BREATH**: PurpleAir + AirNow air quality → 3 Theatre templates (threshold_gate, divergence, cascade)

The core loop: modify classifier/selector → run convergence tests → keep if score improved, discard if not. Max TotalScore = 20.5 (13.0 TemplateScore + 7.5 GrammarScore).

Build order:
1. Phase 0: Scaffolding (replay module, feed ingester, convergence test harness)
2. Phase 1: Five-question feed classifier (Q1 cadence, Q2 distribution, Q3 noise, Q4 density, Q5 thresholds)
3. Phase 2: Selector (rules.js decision tree, template-selector.js)
4. Phase 3: Generalized infrastructure (theatre templates, processors, trust model, RLMF, composition)

Critical constraints: zero external dependencies, Node.js 20+, deterministic, anti-cheating (anonymized fixture mode must pass), structured rule schema with traced_to field, one change per loop iteration.

Reference docs: `grimoires/pub/FORGE_PROGRAM.md` (full spec), `grimoires/pub/TREMOR docs/`, `grimoires/pub/CORONA docs/`, `grimoires/pub/BREATH docs/`, `grimoires/pub/Echelon docs/`
"}

command:
# On Windows, /tmp maps differently. Let's check where files went
ls /tmp/swpc*.json 2>/dev/null || ls $TEMP/swpc*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "checking..."
# Just re-fetch directly to fixtures dir
curl -fsSL "https://services.swpc.noaa.gov/json/goes/primary/xrays-6-hour.json" -o fixtures/swpc-xrays-tmp.json && curl -fsSL "https://services.swpc.noaa.gov/products/noaa-planetary-k-index.json" -o fixtures/swpc-kp-tmp.json && echo "fetched"

command: DONKI_START=$(date -d "7 days ago" +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "from datetime import datetime, timedelta; print((datetime.now()-timedelta(days=7)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))") && DONKI_END=$(date +%Y-%m-%d) && echo "Range: $DONKI_START to $DONKI_END" && curl -fsSL "https://kauai.ccmc.gsfc.nasa.gov/DONKI/WS/get/FLR?startDate=${DONKI_START}&endDate=${DONKI_END}" -o fixtures/donki-flr-tmp.json 2>&1 && echo "FLR: $(wc -c < fixtures/donki-flr-tmp.json) bytes" && curl -fsSL "https://kauai.ccmc.gsfc.nasa.gov/DONKI/WS/get/CME?startDate=${DONKI_START}&endDate=${DONKI_END}" -o fixtures/donki-cme-tmp.json 2>&1 && echo "CME: $(wc -c < fixtures/donki-cme-tmp.json) bytes" || echo "DONKI fetch failed"
input: {"command":"DONKI_START=$(date -d \"7 days ago\" +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null || python3 -c \"from datetime import datetime, timedelta; print((datetime.now()-timedelta(days=7)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))\") && DONKI_END=$(date +%Y-%m-%d) && echo \"Range: $DONKI_START to $DONKI_END\" && curl -fsSL \"https://kauai.ccmc.gsfc.nasa.gov/DONKI/WS/get/FLR?startDate=${DONKI_START}&endDate=${DONKI_END}\" -o fixtures/donki-flr-tmp.json 2>&1 && echo \"FLR: $(wc -c < fixtures/donki-flr-tmp.json) bytes\" && curl -fsSL \"https://kauai.ccmc.gsfc.nasa.gov/DONKI/WS/get/CME?startDate=${DONKI_START}&endDate=${DONKI_END}\" -o fixtures/donki-cme-tmp.json 2>&1 && echo \"CME: $(wc -c < fixtures/donki-cme-tmp.json) bytes\" || echo \"DONKI fetch failed\"","timeout":30000,"description":"Fetch NASA DONKI flares and CMEs"}

command:
# Check for secrets/credentials in all committed files
grep -rn "api_key\|apikey\|password\|secret\|token\|credential\|private\|sk-\|ghp_" \
  --include="*.js" --include="*.json" --include="*.sh" --include="*.yaml" \
  --exclude-dir=".git" \
  . 2>/dev/null | grep -v "node_modules\|\.env.example\|PURPLEAIR_API_KEY\|AIRNOW_API_KEY\|X-API-Key.*PURPLEAIR\|API_KEY.*AIRNOW\|API_KEY=your_\|api_version" | head -30

command:
# Verify all exports are reachable from src/index.js
node --input-type=module <<'EOF'
import {
  ForgeConstruct,
  ingest, ingestFile,
  classify, classifyCadence, classifyDistribution, classifyNoise, classifyDensity, classifyThresholds,
  selectTemplates, evaluateRule, RULES,
  createReplay,
  buildBundle, computeQuality, computeDoubtPrice, assignEvidenceClass, canSettleByClass,
  getTrustTier, canSettle, validateSettlement,
  checkAdversarial, checkChannelConsistency,
  exportCertificate, brierScoreBinary, brierScoreMultiClass,
  computeUsefulness,
  alignFeeds, detectCausalOrdering,
} from './src/index.js';

const exports = [
  'ForgeConstruct','ingest','ingestFile','classify','classifyCadence','classifyDistribution',
  'classifyNoise','classifyDensity','classifyThresholds','selectTemplates','evaluateRule','RULES',
  'createReplay','buildBundle','computeQuality','computeDoubtPrice','assignEvidenceClass',
  'canSettleByClass','getTrustTier','canSettle','validateSettlement','checkAdversarial',
  'checkChannelConsistency','exportCertificate','brierScoreBinary','brierScoreMultiClass',
  'computeUsefulness','alignFeeds','detectCausalOrdering',
];
const values = [
  ForgeConstruct,ingest,ingestFile,classify,classifyCadence,classifyDistribution,
  classifyNoise,classifyDensity,classifyThresholds,selectTemplates,evaluateRule,RULES,
  createReplay,buildBundle,computeQuality,computeDoubtPrice,assignEvidenceClass,
  canSettleByClass,getTrustTier,canSettle,validateSettlement,checkAdversarial,
  checkChannelConsistency,exportCertificate,brierScoreBinary,brierScoreMultiClass,
  computeUsefulness,alignFeeds,detectCausalOrdering,
];
const missing = exports.filter((_, i) => values[i] === undefined);
console.log('Total exports:', exports.length);
console.log('Missing:', missing.length === 0 ? 'none' : missing);
EOF
